description: PHP script importing guzzlehttp/psr7 2.1.0 but only using Response class, never calling the vulnerable Utils::readLine(). CVE-2022-24775 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Only GuzzleHttp\Psr7\Response is used. Utils::readLine() is never called anywhere in source.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable readLine() function is never called. Only the Response class is used, which does not trigger the header injection vulnerability.
